tiny_practice.action: Close your eyes and visualize Jesus seated at the right hand of God, interceding perfectly on your behalf

two_step.reflect_question: How does having Jesus as our perfect High Priest change my approach to seeking God?

options.text: I need to stop trying to earn God's favor through my own efforts
options.response: Surrender current self-improvement strategies and rest in Christ's completed work

options.text: I can approach God confidently through Jesus' mediation
options.response: Practice direct, honest prayer without feeling unworthy

options.text: My relationship with God is based on His new covenant promise
options.response: Study and memorize promises of God's unconditional love

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw a picture of a bridge connecting two lands, representing how Jesus bridges the gap between humanity and God

reevaluation.question: How has my understanding of God's covenant changed after reading this chapter?
options: I see God's love as more intentional
I feel more secure in my relationship with God
I recognize the significance of Jesus' priestly role

three_choice.question: Which theological insight resonates most powerfully about Christ's priesthood?

choices.expansion: Jesus mediates a more excellent covenant, transcending earthly limitations of religious ritual.
God's authentic spiritual dwelling is not constructed by human hands but established directly by divine design.
God promises an internalized relationship where His laws are written on hearts, not just external tablets.

socratic_nudge.question: If God's covenant is now internal and personal, what transformative power does external religious practice still hold?

moral_slider.question: How do you navigate between institutional religious practice and personal spiritual intimacy?

reevaluation.question: How has this chapter challenged your understanding of spiritual mediation?
options: Understood covenant as more relational than transactional
Saw spiritual transformation as internal process

thematic_summaries.title: Superior Priesthood of Christ
thematic_summaries.summary: Christ's priesthood represents a transformative covenant between God and humanity, surpassing the Levitical priestly system. His mediation occurs in the heavenly sanctuary, providing direct spiritual access and redemption.

thematic_summaries.title: New Covenant Fulfillment
thematic_summaries.summary: The new covenant establishes an intimate relationship with God through Christ's perfect sacrifice, replacing the external legal framework with internal spiritual transformation. This covenant promises direct divine relationship and complete spiritual renewal.

reevaluation.question: How does Christ's heavenly priesthood redefine our understanding of divine mediation?
options: Christ provides direct spiritual access, bypassing human intermediaries
The new covenant emphasizes internal transformation over external ritual
Divine relationship is now based on grace, not legalistic performance
Spiritual mediation occurs through personal relationship, not institutional structures
